## Source: ghsa-malware (ceb140b8f39dbe87158984f9f571652a27c355b9a7925fe403a1aa1a493421e4)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (9bb59e6b577e1a28cf71bf254ef70a0641db3319c1985827f792edb51ea14493)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'luno-cocoapods' @ 2.8.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
